Assignment metadata: - objective: SIMPLE FIX for ChatScreen.tsx: Move panel icon buttons from the overcrowded header into a thin vertical right sidebar. Keep the header minimal. DO NOT rewrite the whole file. Make MINIMAL targeted edits: ### Edit 1: Remove panel buttons from header (lines ~384-470) Delete ALL panel icon buttons from the header row: inventory, quests, calendar, character, director, memory, export buttons. These are the buttons with `rounded-[var(--radius-sm)] border px-2 py-1 text-xs` that toggle panels. Remove only the ` ))} ``` This creates a thin vertical icon strip. Place it between the header and the main content div. Find the right spot — after `` and before `
`. ### Edit 3: Move connection + persona + group to a compact bottom area Move the connection select, persona selector, and group avatars out of the header and into a thin bottom strip. Add this AFTER the main content area but before the closing divs. Replace the existing elements with just the connection name display. ### Run verification `npx tsc --noEmit` — must pass `npm test` — must pass CRITICAL: Keep all existing panel rendering code (InventoryPanel, CalendarPanel, etc.) — they're NOT in the header, they're rendered elsewhere. Only move the BUTTONS that toggle them. - role: implementer - resolved_type: implementer Task: SIMPLE FIX for ChatScreen.tsx: Move panel icon buttons from the overcrowded header into a thin vertical right sidebar. Only move the BUTTONS that toggle them.
